## AristoByte Theme Release v1.0.0

### Package

- Extension ID: `aristobyte.aristo-theme-vscode-color-theme`
- Version: `1.0.0`

### Highlights

- Updated VS Code theme package with the latest release changes.
- Includes both dark and light AristoByte themes.
- Keeps release automation and documentation in sync.

### Install

- VS Code Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=aristobyte.aristo-theme-vscode-color-theme
- Open VSX: https://open-vsx.org/extension/aristobyte/aristo-theme-vscode-color-theme

### Resources

- Repository: https://github.com/aristobyte/aristo-theme-vscode-extension
- Changelog: https://github.com/aristobyte/aristo-theme-vscode-extension/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
- Issues: https://github.com/aristobyte/aristo-theme-vscode-extension/issues

### Notes

- The `.vsix` artifact is attached to this release.
- If migrating from an older extension identity, uninstall the old ID first.
